calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-23-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantaprich/M. Vallejo, CSR. Brenda Fields.
Petitioner, Brad Alan Pedinoff present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Brad Alan Pendinoff Mossman.
Decree signed in open court.
